About Me Projects

rutuja1675[at]gmail.com

Building innovative solutions with code

@Blackstone Launchpad

I’m Rutuja Bhure, a Product Data Scientist with an MS in Data Science from University at Buffalo. I help teams answer questions like: What should we build next? How do we know it worked? Why did it move (or not move) the metric? What should we do differently?

My work spans the full decision loop: defining north-star and guardrail metrics, designing and analyzing experiments (A/B tests when possible, quasi-experiments and causal inference when not), and translating results into clear recommendations leaders can act on. I also care deeply about correctness and reproducibility—instrumentation, data quality checks, and automated pipelines—so dashboards and metrics stay trustworthy over time.

Recently, I’ve worked on experimentation, retention/churn analysis, and forecasting, building self-serve reporting that helps teams monitor activation, retention, and monetization in real time. Outside of work, I enjoy hiking, taking photos, and learning new skills.

Resume GitHub LinkedIn Twitter

Experience

Product Data Scientist
UBuffalo CoLab Powered by Blackstone LaunchPad · Part-time
Aug 2024 - Dec 2025 · 1 yr 5 mos
New York · On-site
  • Designed and automated A/B-testing and causal-inference pipelines (p-value adjustment, uplift modeling) that raised founder-to-pilot conversion by 19% and informed dynamic-pricing roll-outs across four ventures.
  • Built revenue-forecasting ensembles (XGBoost, Prophet) improving cash-flow accuracy 40% and shortening fund-raising timelines by two weeks on average.
  • Developed clustering and RFM segmentation workflows in Python (Scikit-Learn, SHAP) that uncovered three high-LTV niches, lifting CAC-adjusted growth 25% for early-stage startups.
  • Collaborated with engineering to implement event instrumentation and self-serve dashboards so founders could monitor activation, retention and monetization in real time.
Causal Inference, Experimental Design, Machine Learning, Statistical Data Analysis, Time Series Analysis, Survival Analysis, Data Analysis, SQL, KPI Reporting
Machine Learning Engineer
KSRA (Robotics) · Full-time
2023 - 2023 · less than a year
Remote
  • Analyzed IoT sensor data to pinpoint indicators of failure modes in industrial robots. Augmented data by running 1000 parallel simulations to generate diverse fault positions. Extracted features from trajectory angles, temperature, torque, and vibrations, including peak frequency and signal-to-noise ratio.
  • Developed ML models to directly predict the likelihood of failure. Incorporated time-series forecasting to account for temporal patterns in sensor data and capture evolving failure trends; considered Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) networks for handling sequential data. Assessed AUC-ROC curve, and F1-score to ensure reliable failure predictions. The end result was a 38% reduction in downtime.
  • Optimized resource allocation through linear programming, incorporating insights from arXiv research papers within the realm of operations research and supply chain management.
Machine Learning, MATLAB, Demand Forecasting, Deep Learning, Time Series Analysis, Statistical Data Analysis
Back End Developer
Dezy It, Inc. · Full-time
2022 - 2022 · less than a year
Remote
  • Designed and developed the database, ensuring optimal performance and scalability for the web application.
  • Developed APIs for Google authentication, utilized socket.io to enable real-time updates to the web application, implemented automated email functionality upon user logins and signups, thereby improving user experience and retention.
  • Spearheaded the creation of a customer and product analytics dashboard, collaborating seamlessly with the marketing team to integrate key performance indicators (KPIs) and leveraging optimized SQL queries to efficiently present data, empowering stakeholders to make informed decisions that significantly propelled the sales funnel.
  • Utilized a range of programming languages, frameworks, protocols, including Javascript, Node.js, React.js, OAuth2.0, SQL to deliver high-quality solutions.
React.js, REST APIs, SQL, Node.js, MongoDB, Database Development

Recent Projects

Pricing A/B Test & Causal Analysis

  • Designed and simulated an end-to-end A/B test on 5,000 institutional clients to measure whether showing fee tier progress nudges users to trade more.
  • Estimated causal treatment effect using CUPED variance reduction (cut variance ~50%, equivalent to 2× sample size) and validated with three robustness tests (Welch's t-test, Mann-Whitney, permutation).
  • Decomposed revenue impact into volume effect vs. rate compression effect, revealing that blanket rollout destroys margin while targeted rollout (clients 10–20% from tier boundary) generates +11% net revenue.
  • Identified a retention insight: clients closest to tier thresholds showed 60% lower churn despite minimal short-term revenue.
  • Detected effect decay of ~2%/week using survival analysis, preventing naive annualization that would have overstated ROI by ~40%
📁 [GITHUB]

End-to-End Market Intelligence Pipeline (ELT)

  • Engineered an automated ELT infrastructure using Airflow to ingest market data from CoinGecko into PostgreSQL; implemented custom retry logic and idempotent upserts to ensure 100% data consistency across daily runs.
  • Architected a 3-layer dbt project (staging, intermediate, marts) to transform raw data into analysis-ready features, including rolling volatility and volume anomaly detection (>2σ thresholds).
  • Automated the deployment of Apache Superset via Python scripts to pre-configure dashboards and SQL Lab, enabling immediate stakeholder access to 'mart-layer' metrics.
📁 [GITHUB]
